channel.title: collaborative development docs revisited on mwartell maladies
channel.description: Recent content in collaborative development docs revisited on mwartell maladies

item.title: annotated exemplar: fixing field mismatches
item.description:
---
date: 2026-02-18
title: fixing field mismatches
current_head: 679a0d47a64fc9686a26ba0cc1f91cd20bb45be7
agent: Copilot Claude Sonnet 4.5
session_type:
instructions: _cdd-instructions.md
topics: [pydantic, schema, cip, field-naming, model-generation]
---
frontmatter: anchoring the session current_head records the exact git commit the agent was working from, making the session reproducible. session_type categorizes the work at a glance. Together these fields answer: "what was the agent looking at, and what kind of work was this?" (Earlier CDDs used an instructions field pointing to a shared formatting file; that role is now handled by the installed skill itself.)

Prompt 1: understanding the issue

While creating and testing ogma.ingest.backwards we found that there were surprising mismatches between ogma.ingest.cip_models and schema/cip_schema.yaml
